cards.title: Rocket Booster
cards.description: It fell off a perfectly good rocket. Still has some kick left.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a huge dented rocket booster engine floating in space with cartoon flames still sputtering out of it, duct tape patches all over it, a cartoon face looking dizzy with spiral eyes, stars and planets in background, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style

cards.title: Ford Pinto
cards.description: Someone launched a 1973 Ford Pinto into orbit. It still rear-ends things.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a rusty beat-up 1970s Ford Pinto car floating in space with a small rocket strapped to the roof, bumper falling off, a bumper sticker that says honk, exhaust fumes in zero gravity forming a cloud, Earth in background, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style

cards.title: Escape Capsule
cards.description: Seats four uncomfortably. Smells like astronaut panic.
cards.art_prompt: Colorful cartoon illustration of a tiny cramped space escape pod capsule with a cartoon window showing terrified cartoon astronaut faces squished against the glass, the capsule is dented and has warning stickers all over it, floating in space near a space station, whimsical fun art style, bright saturated colors, detailed cartoon, Pixar style
